name: SOUTHERN FIRST BANCSHARES INC
summary: Southern First Bancshares, Inc. (SFST) is a bank holding company operating through its subsidiary Southern First Bank. The company provides commercial banking products and services including deposit accounts, commercial and consumer loans, and related financial services. It serves individuals and businesses through its banking operations, focusing on community banking within its geographic markets.
